message:
test(storage): add 44 unit tests for mmap_store scrollback module (ft-2ffku)

Comprehensive coverage for the default-feature mmap_store.rs module
which previously had zero tests. Tests cover:
- page_align_down helper (4 edge cases)
- build_offsets_from_lengths (4 cases including saturating overflow)
- LineOffset ordering
- MmapStoreConfig builder pattern
- MmapStoreError display formatting
- File-backed store: append/tail, partial reads, unicode, long lines,
  persistence across reopen, multiple panes, empty lines
- Hybrid store: dual-write to file+sqlite, sqlite fallback for unknown
  panes, storage mode detection, ensure_pane fallback
- SqliteFallbackStore: basic ops, tail partial, multiple panes, explicit seq
- PaneFile::scan_offsets for offset recovery
- PaneStorageMode Debug/Eq derives

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
